generator: openai/gpt-image-2/edit via FAL; no post-processing; high quality
creative_goal: Fresh artistic visual graphics from Aion's own idea; first slide must feature PROMPT in the graphic style; final slide must mention GenLabs in same typography/world.
visual_world: Mango Monsoon / Thai-modern surreal product poster
master_prompt: MANGO MONSOON: Thai-modern surreal product/poster campaign where the word PROMPT is built from glossy mango ribbons, coconut-milk chrome, wet black street-poster ink, sticky-rice pearl textures, Bangkok monsoon rain, neon market reflections, and cinematic high-contrast product-art lighting. Explore the same world through hero product, macro texture, deconstructed poster, monsoon market angle, prompt recipe card, and GenLabs final slide.

slides.prompt:
Create ONE square 1:1 image for a GenLabs Prompt Drop carousel.
Use the attached references only for overall prompt-gallery energy: bold, stylish, editorial, social-feed-worthy, artistic, strong typography integration. Do not copy exact people, layouts, logos, or existing words.

Visual world: MANGO MONSOON — a Thai-modern surreal product/poster campaign inspired by mango sticky rice, coconut milk, Bangkok monsoon rain, neon market reflections, chrome liquid, sticky-rice pearl textures, street-poster collage, and high-end product-art direction.

The style must feel unique and prompt-worthy, not generic food photography. Use layered visual worlds, impossible studio sets, wet reflections, mango ribbons, coconut-milk chrome, translucent dessert materials, cinematic lighting, and Thai-modern street culture without tourist clichés.

Typography must be generated inside the image and must match the graphic world. No ugly pasted text. No random fake brand names. No watermark. Avoid temples, tuk-tuks, flags, elephants, tourist Thailand clichés.

Slide 1 / Main cover. The word PROMPT is the hero typography, physically built from glossy mango flesh ribbons, black wet street-poster ink, and thin coconut-milk chrome highlights. Behind it: a surreal Thai mango dessert product world — mango slices floating, sticky-rice pearls like tiny moons, rain droplets, neon yellow/orange reflections on black wet surface. Layout like a premium Instagram prompt cover: bold, clean, artistic, high contrast. The text must read exactly: PROMPT. Make this the strongest, most correct image of the carousel.
